items.name_en: Medium Tote from the latest Qixi Limited Edition series. Sweet Qixi, a unique romantic style, is so attractive to girls. The red body is embellished with small red flowers, super gentle and sweet, helping you capture moments of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with black cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, preserving the simple shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.

items.name_cn:
Mini Lady Dior Handbag
White lambskin tricot
No.: M0505ONGE_M030
The Lady Dior handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from white lambskin, it features a striking tricot quilting texture created with topstitching, with a timeless and chic design. A brown tortoiseshell-effect resin D.I.O.R. charm complements the new detachable chain shoulder strap, which alternates between light gold-finish metal links and brown tortoiseshell-effect resin O links. The mini size comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand or crossbody wear.
Exterior: Lambskin
Lining: Lambskin
Detachable O-link chain
Internal zip pocket
Compatible with other Dior embroidered shoulder straps
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 17 x 15 x 7 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Monogram Medium
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.\>The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.\>The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.\>Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 33×16×15cm

items.name_cn:
Monogram Small
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.
The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.
The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.
Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 25.5×14.5×14cm

items.name_cn:
MONTAIGNE Chain Bag
M9208
The M 30 Montaigne product line is inspired by 30 Montaigne, highlighting the classic identity. This handbag is exquisitely decorated with Oblique jacquard fabric, creating an elegant and classic look. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Elegant details such as the '30 Montaigne' embossed logo on the back highlight the fashionable design. It comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 25 x 16.5 x 8 cm

items.name_en: New 💋 This Book Tote handbag is a flagship product embodying the Dior aesthetic, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri. Adorned with a black and gold Butterfly Zodiac pattern embroidery by Pietro Ruffo, with interwoven zodiac symbols and vibrant butterflies, it highlights the zodiac style and can hold various daily essentials. Large size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, can be carried by hand.
